textByHashes.595965ff1457116588929d09235cdf628d0fb820: What can I do for you?
textByHashes.0478d21c9238a6d48fdac653def3d054e6f05e3d: This is true. For a simple enchantment, you may place an offering on my Altar. Can I help you with anything else?
textByHashes.16586bf345254e1b9a2c68edd7584c9750514e66: V? Now that's a name I haven't heard in a long time...
textByHashes.38bacccb5452dfa9b1e1972b01f579c1a94c24b1: Oh yes. Were it not for V, this conversation might never had happened.
textByHashes.9c985e98360395f79b3967514174da16c1704537: I owe V a debt that can never be repaid. It would be an honour to enchant his sigil.
textByHashes.7025dd6978b9a205a2abbce5a932c2c915debd3e: Bring the unenchanted sigil to me and I'll provide you with what you need.
textByHashes.08cba8b531489488696e48e95a065ae67f5cf170: There you go! Go forth mighty warrior.
textByHashes.5d481b6035d47c1d9327c751418427cbd9a46d84: Do not summon me for idle conversation! Come back when you have an offering.
textByHashes.9213c2692eb492e1ab8e13d2d3b537504e48af6a: Many thanks for the offering outerlander. Please accept as a gift the ability to play your lyre...
textByHashes.83c494060bee24e0ddd979a4083c8ff4a60526bd: I offer you this enchantment for your worthy offering.
textByHashes.761c57b13b818af484b5cbd76beb55cf7e3bd85b: A raw bass? You should know that is not a worthy offering, outerlander.
textByHashes.75de04b6c04b65c7fbe447365c8b073ca4818241: If the offering is great enough, I would be happy to offer you such a powerful enchantment.
textByHashes.e99b90f526e9b0508a98879ce0fe85d3ec90f898: Depending on your familiarity of the area, I will require less of an offering.
textByHashes.9a82f6018655746045d11cb793f259b7d41f8489: But for you, I would have you offer me 1000 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik easy diary, it would have been 800.
textByHashes.ea17e923f25914bc10d2d7c7c93cdc7d8c4147b2: But for you, I would have you offer me 800 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik medium diary, it would have been 600.
textByHashes.1c67cfb0f08d18ed1ab3b1ef421b00a731406418: But for you, I would have you offer me 600 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik hard diary, it would have been 400.
textByHashes.5c4f2fe83b13ad023ecb643b418ce04255339a6f: But for you, I would have you offer me 400 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass. But if you had completed the Fremennik elite diary, it would have been 200.
textByHashes.b640138b3667c611c0d695e4e2fef3d2a0e6fa3a: But for you, I would have you offer me 200 raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass.
textByHashes.63025800633a7b05e593bd5402a5027b8743891b: You still need to offer me raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass.
textByHashes.4f98594547e4bd6da4324646c409c97b11a5dcae: While I appreciate the thought of offering me fish, I am afraid I am unable to use the air you have offered me.
textByHashes.8450515478b971218e0b5e130cce09d29d638dd7: Many thanks for your offering. You still need to offer me raw shark, raw manta ray, raw sea turtle and raw bass.
textByHashes.16ef0c45d3d46b990bfe6f3361bcacfd724253af: You have given me a worthy offering, and I will bestow my enchantment whenever you bring me a suitable lyre. I regret I cannot return any of your fish in future, even if you become closer to the Fremenniks.
textByHashes.d4032a0ded314cff56e97137f3fbae6c6648dda0: I offer you this enchantment as you have earned my favour.
textByHashes.c2bf78087ab6838dc7413c95e6c271047ec776c5: You do not have a lyre with you that I can enchant. It must have been strung, but it cannot bear any existing enchantment.
